topPrompts.prompt: Hero product shot of a frosted glass serum dropper bottle and a smooth cream ceramic cream jar arranged together on a warm sandstone plaster pedestal, warm natural sunlight raking from upper left casting soft palm leaf shadows across the textured plaster wall behind, the glass bottle refracting golden light, the ceramic jar catching a warm highlight on its dome lid, warm sand and cream color palette throughout, a single eucalyptus sprig resting beside the products, 85mm f/2.8, warm Mediterranean luxury skincare product photography, HD 4K

Chest-up portrait of a young woman with freckled dewy skin, slicked-back dark hair, green eyes, small gold hoop earrings, eyes closed in a calm expression, fingertips gently pressing serum into her cheekbone, warm golden sunlight from a window to camera-left wrapping across her face highlighting the freckles and natural dewiness, visible skin texture with natural pores and healthy glow, warm cream plaster wall softly out of focus behind, no heavy makeup, 105mm f/1.8 portrait lens, warm luminous clean beauty editorial skincare photography

Single smooth cream ceramic cream jar with rounded dome lid placed on a warm sandstone ledge, warm sunlight casting a long soft shadow behind the jar, delicate palm leaf shadows falling across the textured plaster wall above, fine water mist droplets on the jar surface catching golden light, shallow depth of field with the dome lid sharp and the plaster background softly blurred, warm sand and cream tones throughout, 85mm f/2.8 macro detail, warm Mediterranean product photography
